ops.title: captain-hook: reword codex-lane pack nudges for codex-ask v2 (auto scratch + --await)
ops.description: codex plugin 0.16.0 (cc-skills) makes codex-ask resolve its own scratch dir (harness session scratchpad via `cc-transcript scratchpad`, else `mktemp -d`), print `REPLY_FILE:`/`LOG_FILE:`/`AWAIT:` before the run starts, detach the codex process so Bash-tool timeouts lose nothing, and adds `codex-ask --await <dir>` for recovery. Any captain-hook codex-lane pack nudge that mentions passing `-s` / a "session scratchpad" path, or that describes the old print-at-end behavior, needs the same rewording the cc-skills docs got: agents never pass a scratch dir, timeouts recover via the `AWAIT:` line, backgrounding the call is banned. Sweep the pack sources in the captain-hook repo (different repo — out of scope for the cc-skills change that spawned this), cut a pack release so @latest consumers actually receive it (pack sources read GitHub releases, not main).

ops.text: No captain-hook pack nudge tells agents to pass -s or mentions a session scratchpad path
Nudges that describe codex-ask timeout behavior mention AWAIT/--await recovery
A pack release is cut so @latest consumers receive the rewording
